name: kaito-mcp-server
description: Crypto market intelligence from Kaito AI — sentiment, mindshare, social analytics, rankings, and more.

api_key.title: Kaito API Key
api_key.description: Your Kaito API key. Get one at https://kaito.ai

tools.name: kaito_entities
tools.description: List or search supported Kaito token identifiers by project name, token value, symbol, or CoinGecko slug

tools.name: kaito_search
tools.description: Default natural-language Kaito search for most user requests across Twitter, News, Research, and Podcast content

tools.name: kaito_feeds
tools.description: Use this when you want the top ranked content feed for the whole market or scoped to a single resolved token, optionally within a time window.

tools.name: kaito_narratives
tools.description: List or search supported Kaito narrative IDs by narrative code or display name

tools.name: kaito_advanced_search
tools.description: Power-user structured Kaito search with explicit control over tokens, usernames, sources, time filters, sorting, language, and thresholds

tools.name: kaito_tweet_engagement_info
tools.description: Detailed engagement metrics for a specific tweet, including likes, retweets, replies, views, and smart engagement count

tools.name: kaito_sentiment_entity
tools.description: Daily sentiment time series for a token, including volume-weighted bullish and bearish scores plus notable events

tools.name: kaito_engagement
tools.description: Daily engagement metrics for a token or keyword, including total and smart/KOL engagement

tools.name: kaito_mentions
tools.description: Daily mention counts for a token or keyword across Twitter, News, Podcast, and Research

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_entity
tools.description: Daily mindshare time series for a token, showing its share of crypto Twitter conversation

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_entity_arena
tools.description: Project rankings by mindshare score, with optional category and time window filters

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_entity_delta
tools.description: Top gainers and losers by mindshare change over a selected time window

tools.name: kaito_smart_following_market
tools.description: Market-level signal showing which accounts smart followers have recently followed

tools.name: kaito_smart_followers
tools.description: Smart follower data for a Twitter user, including total smart follower count or gained followers for a specific date

tools.name: kaito_smart_following
tools.description: Latest smart accounts followed by a Twitter user in reverse chronological order

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_entity_by_account
tools.description: Top KOLs ranked by mindshare for a given token

tools.name: kaito_twitter_user_metadata
tools.description: Twitter user profile metadata by user ID, including name, username, bio, follower stats, and account classification

tools.name: kaito_events
tools.description: Upcoming catalyst events for a token, with filtering by event type, source, and date range

tools.name: kaito_mindshare_narrative
tools.description: Daily mindshare time series for a crypto narrative
